pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your needs. No hidden fees.
pricing.plan.starter.name: Starter
pricing.plan.starter.description: Perfect for individuals and small teams
pricing.plan.professional.name: Professional
pricing.plan.enterprise.name: Enterprise
pricing.plan.enterprise.description: For large organizations with advanced needs
pricing.faq.q1.question: Can I change plans later?
pricing.faq.q1.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.
pricing.faq.q2.question: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq.q2.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for enterprise plans.
pricing.faq.q3.question: Is there a free trial?
pricing.faq.q3.answer: Yes, all plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Browse our beautiful collection of images
gallery.no_images: No images found in this category
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our service
faq.still_questions_desc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.
faq.getting_started.q1.question: How do I create an account?
faq.getting_started.q1.answer: To create an account, click on the "Sign Up" button in the top right corner. Fill in your details including name, email, and password. You'll receive a verification email to confirm your account.
faq.getting_started.q2.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.getting_started.q2.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for enterprise plans. All payments are processed securely through our payment partners.
faq.getting_started.q3.question: Is there a free trial available?
faq.getting_started.q3.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial on all our plans. No credit card required to start your trial. You can upgrade to a paid plan at any time during or after the trial period.
faq.billing.q1.question: Can I change my plan later?
faq.billing.q1.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. Changes will take effect in the next billing cycle. If you upgrade, you'll be charged a prorated amount.
faq.billing.q2.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.billing.q2.answer: You can cancel your subscription anytime from the Billing section in your account settings. Your account will remain active until the end of your current billing period.
faq.billing.q3.question: Do you offer refunds?
faq.billing.q3.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with our service within the first 30 days, contact our support team for a full refund.
faq.features.q1.question: How many team members can I add?
faq.features.q1.answer: The number of team members depends on your plan. Starter allows up to 5 members, Professional up to 25, and Enterprise offers unlimited team members.
faq.features.q2.question: Is my data secure?
faq.features.q2.answer: Absolutely! We use industry-standard encryption (AES-256) for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. We also perform regular security audits and comply with GDPR, SOC 2, and other security standards.
faq.features.q3.question: Can I integrate with other tools?
faq.features.q3.answer: Yes, we offer integrations with popular tools like Slack, Google Workspace, Microsoft Teams, Zapier, and many more. Professional and Enterprise plans also have access to our full API for custom integrations.
faq.features.q4.question: What kind of support do you provide?
faq.features.q4.answer: All plans include email support with a 24-hour response time. Professional plans get priority support with 4-hour response. Enterprise plans include 24/7 phone support and a dedicated account manager.
faq.technical.q1.question: What browsers do you support?
faq.technical.q1.answer: We support the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. For the best experience, we recommend keeping your browser up to date.
faq.technical.q2.question: Do you have a mobile app?
faq.technical.q2.answer: Yes! We have native mobile apps for both iOS and Android. You can download them from the App Store and Google Play Store. All features are available on mobile.
faq.technical.q3.question: How often do you release updates?
faq.technical.q3.answer: We release new features and improvements every 2-3 weeks. Critical security updates are deployed as needed. You can track our product roadmap and updates in our changelog.

landing.testimonials.subtitle: See what designers, developers, and founders are saying about their experience building with Adminex.
landing.testimonials.items.ayesha.quote: The spacing, typography, and component consistency are excellent. We shipped our admin in days instead of weeks.
landing.testimonials.items.daniel.quote: Charts, tables, and CRUD flows are ready out of the box. The codebase is clean and easy to extend.
landing.testimonials.items.meera.quote: Looks premium in both light and dark mode. Perfect for demos and production dashboards.
landing.testimonials.items.james.quote: The documentation is comprehensive and the code quality is top-notch. A joy to work with.
landing.testimonials.items.sarah.quote: Finally a template that pays attention to the small details. The animations and transitions are buttery smooth.
landing.testimonials.items.michael.quote: The component library is deep and the layout system makes customization straightforward.
landing.pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your next project. No hidden fees.
landing.pricing.plans.starter.name: Starter
landing.pricing.plans.starter.descriptio: Perfect for individuals and small teams
landing.pricing.plans.professional.name: Professional
landing.pricing.plans.enterprise.name: Enterprise
landing.pricing.plans.enterprise.descrip: For large organizations with advanced needs
landing.faq.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help.
landing.faq.items.free_template.question: Is this a free template?
landing.faq.items.free_template.answer: Yes! Adminex has a generous free tier that includes essential pages and basic components. The Pro version includes 50+ pages, advanced charts, and Figma files.
landing.faq.items.commercial_use.questio: Can I use this for commercial projects?
landing.faq.items.commercial_use.answer: Absolutely. The standard license allows personal and commercial use. For SaaS applications where end-users are charged, you might need an Extended License.
landing.faq.items.support.question: Do you offer support?
landing.faq.items.support.answer: We provide community support for the free version. Pro users get priority email support with a guaranteed 24-hour response time.
landing.faq.items.react_version.question: Which version of React is used?
landing.faq.items.react_version.answer: Adminex is built on the latest React and uses Vite for the build system. It also leverages modern React Router for routing.
landing.faq.items.typescript_required.an: The project is written in TypeScript for better type safety and developer experience, but you can also use JavaScript if you prefer.
landing.faq.items.updates.question: How do I get updates?
landing.faq.items.updates.answer: We release updates regularly. If you purchased the Pro version, you'll receive an email with a download link for the latest version.

typography.body_text: Body text is the default paragraph size.

features.rule_engine.title: Rule Engine
features.rule_engine.subtitle: Visual IF/AND/OR/THEN rule builder with real-time evaluation
features.rule_engine.visual_builder_desc: Create complex rules with an intuitive interface. Support for nested AND/OR conditions.
features.rule_engine.realtime_testing_de: Test your rules instantly with sample data. See which conditions match and why.
features.rule_engine.templates_desc: Start quickly with pre-built templates for common business rules and workflows.
features.query_builder.title: Query Builder
features.query_builder.subtitle: Build complex queries with nested filters and export to SQL/JSON
features.query_builder.nested_filters_de: Build complex queries with nested AND/OR groups. Unlimited depth for advanced filtering.
features.query_builder.export_options_de: Export your queries to JSON or SQL format. Perfect for API integration or database queries.
features.query_builder.live_execution_de: Execute queries against sample data in real-time. See instant results as you build.
features.simulation.title: Real-Time Simulation
features.simulation.subtitle: Live data streaming with anomaly detection and statistical analysis
features.simulation.live_data_streams_de: Multiple configurable data streams with realistic patterns and noise simulation.
features.simulation.anomaly_detection_de: Advanced algorithms detect anomalies using Bollinger Bands and statistical thresholds.
features.simulation.statistical_analysis: Real-time calculation of min, max, mean, standard deviation, and moving averages.
features.simulation.stream_presets_desc: Pre-configured streams for CPU, Memory, Network, Sales, and Temperature monitoring.
features.simulation.data_gen_base_value: Base value with random noise injection
features.insights.title: Smart Insights
features.insights.subtitle: AI-powered analysis with trend detection and actionable recommendations
features.insights.trends_desc: Detect upward/downward trends and growth patterns.
features.insights.forecasts_desc: Predict future values based on patterns.
features.workflow.title: Workflow Builder
features.workflow.subtitle: Visual workflow automation with drag-and-drop
features.workflow.description: Build complex automation workflows with a visual node-based editor. Connect triggers, conditions, and actions to create powerful automated processes.
features.task_scheduler.title: Task Scheduler
features.task_scheduler.subtitle: Intelligent task scheduling with dependencies
features.task_scheduler.description: Advanced task management with dependency tracking, Gantt chart visualization, critical path analysis, and intelligent scheduling algorithms.
